welcome.title: Chat live with your voice AI agent

setup.title: CAAL Setup
setup.subtitle: Enter your server address to get started
setup.settingsNote: Full agent settings are available during an active session via the gear icon.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHint: Controls TTS voice and wake greetings language
settings.sttLanguageHint: Hint for speech-to-text. Auto works well for most cases.
settings.modelNote: Note: Model, context size, and wake word changes take effect on next session.
settings.disconnectConfirmMessage: Saving will disconnect and restart the agent with new settings.
